$description: Canonical source of truth for all visual tokens. Read by generate-dashboard.js, brand-overlay.sh, verify-brand.sh.

aesthetic.name: Neo-Swiss Clean and Soft Explainer
aesthetic.subtitle: Corporate Clean and Premium
aesthetic.description: Flat vector illustration with Swiss grid, white space, column composition, faceless human figures, soft geometric shapes, UI elements (chips, checklists, timers). Soft shadows and discrete micro-gradients. High legibility: large text and high contrast, never on noisy backgrounds.
aesthetic.illustrations: Flat vector, faceless figures, soft geometric shapes, UI elements

palette.$note: Exclusive 6-color palette from Neo-Swiss aesthetic spec

logo.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 36 36" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="MetodologIA"><defs><linearGradient id="lg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#122562"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1A3278"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="36" height="36" rx="10" fill="url(#lg)"/><rect x="10" y="12" width="4" height="12" rx=".5" fill="#FFF"/><rect x="16" y="12" width="4" height="8" rx=".5" fill="#FFF"/><rect x="16" y="22" width="4" height="2" rx=".5" fill="#FFF"/><rect x="22" y="12" width="4" height="6" rx=".5" fill="#FFF"/><rect x="22" y="20" width="4" height="4" rx=".5" fill="#FFF"/><circle cx="18" cy="8" r="2" fill="#FFD700"/></svg>

voice.language: Español latino neutro, tú por defecto

meta.no-green-rule: Blue #137DC5 replaces green for done/verified/success. NEVER use #27c93f or #22c55e.
meta.aesthetic-name: Neo-Swiss Clean and Soft Explainer (Corporate Clean and Premium)
